Postdoctoral Fellows.name: Dr. Anupama Sahu
Postdoctoral Fellows.description: Dr. Anupama Sahu holds a PhD from NIT Rourkela in metallurgical and materials engineering. Her research focuses on anode materials for batteries, contributing to advancements in energy storage technologies.

education.phd: NIT Rourkela - Metallurgical and Materials Engineering

PhD Students.name: Aditya Choudhary
PhD Students.degree: MSc-PhD dual degree student, PMRF fellow
PhD Students.description: Aditya Choudhary is a dedicated MSc-PhD dual degree student and PMRF fellow at IIT Bhilai, specializing in solid-state photochemistry. His research focuses on exploring the optical properties and photochemical behaviors of crystalline materials. He has authored 6 publications (2023-2025) in prestigious journals including Chemical Communications and Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters. Best Poster Award recipient at NSC-51, VNIT Nagpur (Dec 2024).
publications: A. Ekka, U. Kurakula, A. Choudhury, A. Mishra, A. Faye, N. R. Halcovitch & R. Medishetty, Light-driven flagella-like motion of coordination compound single crystals, Chem. Comm., 2023, DOI: 10.1039/D3CC00333G

S. Khan, B. Dutta, S. Naaz, A. Choudhury, P. A. Cazade, E. Kiely, S. Guerin, R. Medishetty & M. H. Mir, Regulating photosalient behavior in dynamic metal-organic crystals, Communications Chemistry, 2023, DOI: 10.1038/s42004-023-00951-0

J. An, J. Oh, U. Kurakula, D. H. Lee, A. Choudhury, E. Lee, R. Medishetty & I. H. Park, Solid-State Structural Transformation in Zn(II) Metal–Organic Frameworks in Single-Crystal-to-Single-Crystal Fashion, Nanomaterials, 2023, DOI: 10.3390/nano13162319

S. Khan, P. Das, S. Naaz, P. Brandão, A. Choudhury, R. Medishetty, P. P. Ray & M. H. Mir, A dual-functional 2D coordination polymer exhibiting photomechanical and electrically conductive behaviours, Dalton Transactions, 2023, DOI: 10.1039/D3DT02728G

A. Ekka, A. Choudhury, M. Samanta, A. Deshmukh, N. R. Halcovitch, I. H. Park & R. Medishetty, Solid-State [2+2] Photoreaction of Isostructural Cd(II) Metal Complexes and Solid-State Fluorescence, Molecules, 29(2):351, 2024, DOI: 10.3390/molecules29020351

A. Choudhury, N. Prasad, T. Banana, P. S. Lal, D. S. Hughes, N. R. Halcovitch, Md Mehboob Alam, S. Vempati & R. Medishetty, Stepwise Photoreactions and Photosalient Effects in Isostructural Donor–Acceptor Molecular Complexes with Tunable Optical Properties, J. Phys. Chem. Lett., 16(27):7083–7089, 2025, DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.5c01282

PhD Students.name: Uma Kurakula
PhD Students.description: Uma Kurakula is a PhD Scholar at IIT Bhilai working on inorganic and metal-organic solid state materials. She completed her M.Sc. from IIT Bhilai and B.Sc. from Kakatiya University. She has authored 5 publications (2023-2025) in top journals including Chemistry Communications and Crystal Growth & Design.
PhD Students.research: Inorganic and metal-organic solid state materials
publications: A. Ekka, U. Kurakula, A. Choudhury, A. Mishra, A. Faye, N. R. Halcovitch & R. Medishetty, Light-driven flagella-like motion of coordination compound single crystals, Chem. Comm., 2023, DOI: 10.1039/D3CC00333G

PhD Students.name: Anamika Gogoi
PhD Students.description: Anamika Gogoi is a PhD Scholar researching inorganic and metal-organic solid state materials. She holds an M.Sc. from NIT Rourkela and B.Sc. from Jorhat Institute of Technology. She has contributed to 2 publications (2023) in RSC Advances and CrystEngComm.

PhD Students.name: Devendra Dewangan
PhD Students.description: Devendra Dewangan is a PhD Scholar focusing on solid state photochemistry and energy storage materials. He completed his M.Sc. from IIT Bhilai and B.Sc. from Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya. He has authored 2 publications (2025) in Polyhedron and ACS Applied Bio Materials.
